data.title: Constellation Energy powers to all-time highs after blockbuster Calpine deal
data.description:
Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG), already the biggest U.S. nuclear plant operator, also will become the largest independent power provider in the U.S. after agreeing to buy privately-held natural gas and geothermal company Calpine, sending its shares closing +25.1% to an all-time high of $310.
Constellation (NASDAQ:CEG) said the acquisition could add $2B/year to its free cash flow, and together the companies would have nearly 60 GW of capacity from zero- and low-emission sources, including nuclear, natural gas and geothermal.
Although Constellation (CEG) will issue 50M new shares as part of the deal, the market is cheering because the acquisition is expected to provide immediate earnings per share accretion of more than 20% in 2026 and at least $2/share in future years.
The attractive purchase price is a key factor behind the expected earnings accretion, analysts say: With a net purchase price of $26.6B - which includes Calpine's net debt, the expected cash generated by Calpine between the deal signing and the expected closing date, and the value of tax attributes at Calpine - Constellation (CEG) is paying less than 8x Calpine's expected 2026 EBITDA, analysts said.
From a strategic view, the addition of Calpine provides Constellation (CEG) with significantly more exposure to the Texas and California markets, which figure to be very active in the expansion of data centers, while also complementing its current core markets in the Midwest and East coast.
While the deal adds fossil fuel exposure, it also comes with a sizeable clean energy portfolio, and the combined company will still have a generation footprint that is 58% zero carbon, according to a report from S&P Global.
Even before Friday’s run-up, Constellation's (CEG) enterprise value as a multiple of 2026 EBITDA looked frothy, but since there are only four public power generators with exposure to the AI-demand theme - joining Vistra (VST), Talen Energy (TLN) and NRG Energy (NRG) - the deal was the right one to send an already high-powered stock like Constellation surging.
ETF: (XLU)

data.title: System1 receives NYSE non-compliance notice
data.description:
• System1 (NYSE:SST) said on Friday that it was notified by the New York Stock Exchange that it is not in compliance with NYSE’s listing standards because the average closing price of the company’s Class A common stock was less than $1.00 over a consecutive 30 trading-day period.
  • The notice does not result in the immediate delisting of the company’s common stock from the NYSE.
  • The company plans to notify the NYSE by January 21, 2025 that it intends to cure the average closing stock price deficiency and to return to compliance with the NYSE's continued listing standards.
  • System1 (NYSE:SST) shares were up 1.43% in post-market trading on Friday.

data.title: SA Charts: Climb in retail trade hiring fueled December's better-than-expected job growth
data.description:
U.S. job growth accelerated in December, according to government data release Friday, helped in part by a significant swing in retail hiring.

Non-farm payrolls rose 256K in December, well above the 157K increase that economists were predicting. This compared to 212K added for the previous month. With the faster job growth, the unemployment rate dipped to 4.1% compared to 4.2% in the previous month.

The jump was helped by a turnaround in the retail trade sector, which added 43.4K jobs during December. This compared to a loss in November. This was partially offset by a retreat in manufacturing jobs in December, which saw a dip of 16K in the month.

  • December Jobs Report: Busting The Fed's Labor Market Assessment
  • Catalyst Watch: Bank earnings, oil updates, powerhouse conferences in retail and healthcare
  • Stocks end lower as hot jobs data sparks recalibration of rate cut bets

data.title: Rexford Industrial records no damage to its properties from LA wildfires
data.description:
Rexford Industrial Realty (NYSE:REXR) said Friday it recorded no damage to its properties from the wildfires in Los Angeles County.

As such, the company noted it does not expect unfavorable impacts to its operating results or financial condition.

Rexford (NYSE:REXR) shares are down roughly 5% in the past five trading sessions.

data.title: Accelerate Diagnostics reports preliminary FY 2024 revenue of $11.7 million
data.description:
• Accelerate Diagnostics (NASDAQ:AXDX) on Friday reported FY 2024 preliminary revenue of about $11.7 million, compared to consensus revenue estimates of $11.90 million and revenue of $12.1 million in the prior year.
  • The company ended the year with about $16.3 million in cash and cash equivalents, compared to $20.9 million at the start of the fourth quarter, a reduction in cash and cash equivalents for the fourth quarter of 2024 of $4.5 million.
  • AXDX -2.5% after hours to $1.17.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: ESPN BET sportsbooks will be at 19 PENN casinos after the latest expansion
data.description:
PENN Entertainment (NASDAQ:PENN) announced during the week that another 10 retail sportsbooks at key properties will be rebranded to ESPN BET Sportsbook during the early part of 2025.

The list of Hollywood and Ameristar Casino properties that will have sportsbooks rebranded as ESPN BET Sportsbook includes locations in Iowa, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Colorado, Indiana, and West Virginia. PENN's (NASDAQ:PENN) existing ESPN BET retail locations span properties in Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, and Ohio.

Following regulatory approvals, the total number of ESPN BET branded sportsbooks at PENN (PENN) properties will be 19.

Last year, PENN (PENN) released several product enhancements and ESPN integrations to the ESPN BET offering. Those product improvements helped contribute to a higher parlay mix and higher structural hold during Q3. By the end of that quarter, ESPN Bet had close to four million members in its digital database. Looking ahead, PENN (PENN) thinks increased integration across the ESPN ecosystem will help drive more monetization through enhanced engagement, retention, and reactivation.

The ESPN BET app and website launched on November 14, 2023.
